speaker: speaker1
text: Office Supplies , Inc . Robert speaking , may I help you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Hi , Robert . This is Janet Reese calling from American Advertising . We placed an order with you about a week ago .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , Ms . Reese . I remember , you spoke with me . Is there a problem ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , it still hasn ’ t gotten here , and my boss is pretty angry about it .
